raw_transcript: Yes, Doctor. It started slowly, just with meat and bread. But now, even water seems to sit in my throat and then gurgle back up. At night, if I lay flat, undigested food from dinner comes back into my mouth. It's disgusting, and I've lost twenty pounds because I'm just miserable.
final_corrected_note: Yes, Doctor. It started slowly, just with meat and bread. But now, even water seems to sit in my throat and then gurgle back up. At night, if I lay flat, undigested food from dinner comes back into my mouth. It's disgusting, and I've lost twenty pounds because I'm just miserable.
